status.description: Overall outcome of the delegated task.

summary.description: One-paragraph human-readable summary of what was done.

artifacts.description: Files Codex produced or modified during this task. Empty array if none.

path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the artifact.

description.description: One-line description of the artifact. Use empty string if none.

assumptions.description: Assumptions Codex made when the spec was ambiguous. Empty array if none.

errors.description: Non-fatal errors or warnings encountered. Empty array if none.
